summary:
Feature: Deep antagonistic audit: full-system bug fix and architectural hardening sweep

## Objective

Perform a deep, antagonistic audit of the entire helixir codebase. The goal is to find bugs, architectural weaknesses, dead code, inconsistencies, and correctness issues — then FIX them. Not a report. Fixes.

## Scope

The full system: `packages/core/src/` (52 source files — handlers, analyzers, tools, shared utilities, config) and `src/` (API, CLI, MCP entry points). Plus `tests/` (62 test fil
